title: Add checkout payment methods: UPI, Card, and Cash on Delivery

requirements.text: Offer three payment methods at checkout—UPI, Card, and Cash on Delivery (COD)—and ensure the selected method is saved on the order and shown on the Orders page.

quotes: Payment method upi card and cod

acceptanceCriteria: Checkout UI shows selectable options for UPI, Card, and Cash on Delivery (COD) using clear English labels.
Placing an order persists the selected payment method in the stored order record.
Orders page displays the correct payment method label for each order (UPI, Card, Cash on Delivery).

requirements.text: Ensure the Card payment flow uses Stripe Checkout session creation and redirects the user to Stripe, while UPI and COD place the order without redirect and show a confirmation message.

quotes: Payment method upi card and cod

acceptanceCriteria: When Card is selected, the app creates a Stripe Checkout session and redirects the browser to the returned Stripe session URL.
When UPI is selected, the app places the order and shows an on-screen confirmation message indicating the user should complete UPI payment.
When COD is selected, the app places the order and shows an on-screen confirmation message indicating payment will be collected on delivery.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo; only add a migration file if existing stable state must be upgraded.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutablePaths; compose existing UI components instead.
nonGoals: Implementing a real UPI payment gateway or verifying UPI payment completion on-chain/off-chain.
Adding additional payment methods beyond UPI, Card (Stripe), and Cash on Delivery.
